title: Jain temples, Abhapur

overview.short: Jain temples, Abhapur is a group of twelve Śvetāmbara Jain temples located in Abhapur village near Polo Forest in Sabarkantha district of Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Polo Forest
topPlaces.description: Polo Forest, also known as Vijaynagar Forest, is a dry mixed deciduous forest near Abhapur village in Vijaynagar Taluka, Sabarkantha district, Gujarat, India. It is located at the foothills of the Aravalli Range and on the banks of the perennial Harnav River, spread over the area of 400 square kilometres (99,000 acres).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jain temples, Abhapur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jain temples, Abhapur is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jain temples, Abhapur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (78 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jain temples, Abhapur?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jain temples, Abhapur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jain temples, Abhapur?
faq.a: Stays in Jain temples, Abhapur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jain temples, Abhapur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Polo Forest.
